pre-push: if [ -n "$(git status --porcelain)" ]; then echo "❌ Error: You have uncommitted changes. Please commit or stash them before pushing."; git status --short; exit 1; fi && command -v d2 >/dev/null 2>&1 || (echo "D2 not found, installing..." && pnpm run install:d2) && echo "Running build before push..." && pnpm run generate-search-index && pnpm run build && node scripts/log-preview-url.js
